channel.title: Career on Victor Jacek
channel.description: Recent content in Career on Victor Jacek

item.title: Virtue Signaling
item.description: I originally wrote this on 2022-8-24, 4 years and 2 jobs ago, after my then-employer had it’s first significant round of layoffs to make Wall Street happy. I survived the layoffs, but was still furious at how it was handled. Now, as I undertake a huge new learning and transition from Staff Engineer to Engineering Manager myself, I feel like enough time has passed to separate these thoughts from the specific situation, and actually commit to holding myself to the same standard I demanded back then.
